allow: PowerShell($data = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\Manum\\.claude\\projects\\D--Manum-GastroBridge\\9ba27e89-cd7c-4742-954c-61b243d8890e\\tool-results\\mcp-claude_ai_Supabase-get_advisors-1778585939943.txt" -Raw; $j = $data | ConvertFrom-Json; $inner = $j[0].text | ConvertFrom-Json; $inner.result.lints | Group-Object name | Select-Object Count,@{n='name';e={$_.Name}},@{n='level';e={$_.Group[0].level}} | Sort-Object Count -Descending | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($data = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\Manum\\.claude\\projects\\D--Manum-GastroBridge\\9ba27e89-cd7c-4742-954c-61b243d8890e\\tool-results\\mcp-claude_ai_Supabase-get_advisors-1778585939943.txt" -Raw; $j = $data | ConvertFrom-Json; $inner = $j[0].text | ConvertFrom-Json; $inner.result.lints | Where-Object { $_.level -in @\('ERROR','WARN'\) -and $_.name -notin @\('anon_security_definer_function_executable','authenticated_security_definer_function_executable','function_search_path_mutable'\) } | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.level\) | $\($_.name\) | $\($_.detail\)" })

PowerShell($data = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\Manum\\.claude\\projects\\D--Manum-GastroBridge\\9ba27e89-cd7c-4742-954c-61b243d8890e\\tool-results\\mcp-claude_ai_Supabase-get_advisors-1778585939943.txt" -Raw; $j = $data | ConvertFrom-Json; $inner = $j[0].text | ConvertFrom-Json; $inner.result.lints | Where-Object { $_.name -in @\('rls_enabled_no_policy','auth_otp_long_expiry','auth_mfa_disabled'\) } | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.level\) | $\($_.name\) | $\($_.detail\)" })

PowerShell($data = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\Manum\\.claude\\projects\\D--Manum-GastroBridge\\9ba27e89-cd7c-4742-954c-61b243d8890e\\tool-results\\mcp-claude_ai_Supabase-get_advisors-1778585939943.txt" -Raw; $j = $data | ConvertFrom-Json; $inner = $j[0].text | ConvertFrom-Json; $inner.result.lints | Where-Object { $_.name -eq 'function_search_path_mutable' } | ForEach-Object { $_.detail })

PowerShell($data = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\Manum\\.claude\\projects\\D--Manum-GastroBridge\\9ba27e89-cd7c-4742-954c-61b243d8890e\\tool-results\\mcp-claude_ai_Supabase-get_advisors-1778585939943.txt" -Raw; $j = $data | ConvertFrom-Json; $inner = $j[0].text | ConvertFrom-Json; $inner.result.lints | Where-Object { $_.name -eq 'anon_security_definer_function_executable' } | ForEach-Object { $_.detail } | Select-Object -First 25)
